survivingCandidates.name: Receipt-Stable Descriptor Residual Candidate
survivingCandidates.scope: public computational metadata and simple descriptor residuals where control and replay both weaken rival explanations

survivingCandidates.name: Evidence-Receipt Replay Boundary Candidate
survivingCandidates.scope: source-bound evidence packages where reretrieval and replay determine whether residual signals remain claimable
limits: often behaves like claim-safety infrastructure rather than a new scientific signal
